---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for encave
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like encave to do. Include the command/flag shape if you have one in
mind (e.g. `encave <command> ...`).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope

- [ ] This fits encave's model (isolated, reproducible agent homes; secrets stay
      out of git; no command prints a stored credential).

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or examples.
